$comment: Centralized build-time defaults for the app (web + Android APK). These are DEFAULTS ONLY: the user can override any of them at runtime in Settings, and their choice is persisted in localStorage. Change values here to reship different defaults (e.g. a new home-server IP) without touching code. Bundled into every build via a JSON import in src/settings.js.

server.comment: Home-server (dictionary KB + AI explanations + vocab/position sync) base URL. On the phone this must be the LAN IP of the machine running `npm run server`, not localhost. Empty string = local dictionary/sync off until the user sets it.
